# Workflow: {{build_name}}

## Trigger
New feature or system

## Objective
Ship working system

## Inputs
- Requirements
- Architecture

## Outputs
- Functional module

## Steps
1. Define architecture
2. Build database
3. Build API
4. Build frontend
5. Connect systems
6. Add validation
7. Add error handling
8. Test system

## QA Checklist
- [ ] API works
- [ ] UI renders
- [ ] DB connected
- [ ] Errors handled

## Deliverables
- Production-ready feature
